patchNotes:
### v0.3.1 — Monster Rarity & Visual Polish
- Monster rarity visual improvements
- 6 new dungeon themes
- Fixed hexblade shadow step animation
- Improved particle performance
- Arena Analyst advanced views

### v0.3.0 — Turn Resolver Overhaul
- Split turn resolver into 10 sub-modules
- Inventory panel overhaul with bag sort
- New set bonus badges
- 61 smoke tests added
